title: Washington
excerpt:
Consumer Assistance in Washington

Contact your state department of insurance to get consumer help with a health insurance problem or question.

Medicaid in Washington

You can apply for Medicaid in Washington by contacting your state Medicaid agency.

Shop Health Insurance Marketplace® in Washington

If your small business is located in Washington, you can use the Washington Healthplanfinder website to learn more about offering your employees health coverage.

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® for Employees in Washington

If your employer offers SHOP health coverage in Washington, you should contact your employer or visit the Washington Healthplanfinder website for more information.

Health Insurance Marketplace® in Washington

If you live in Washington, you’ll use the Washington Healthplanfinder website to enroll in health coverage.

CHIP in Washington

Apple Health for Kids covers uninsured children in families with moderate incomes that are too high to qualify for Medicaid. You can find out whether your children qualify for Apple Health for Kids right now. Fill out a Marketplace application and find out whether your children qualify. Learn more about Apple Health for Kids in Washington.
